possible_cause: The air temperature measured at the vehicle is lower than approximately 3 C.
recommended_action: Ride carefully and think well ahead. Take extra care in low temperatures, especially on bridges and shaded roads.

possible_cause: The ABS function is not available because self-diagnosis did not complete. The motorcycle has to move forward a few metres for the wheel sensors to be tested.
recommended_action: Pull away slowly. ABS is not available until self-diagnosis has completed.

possible_cause: The DTC function is not available because self-diagnosis did not complete. The motorcycle has to reach a minimum speed with the engine running for the wheel sensors to be checked.
recommended_action: Pull away slowly. DTC is not available until self-diagnosis has completed.

possible_cause: DTC has detected instability at the rear wheel and has intervened to reduce torque.
recommended_action: You can continue to ride. Ride carefully and think well ahead.

possible_cause: The vehicle key being used is not authorised for starting, or communication between vehicle key and electrical machine electronics is disrupted.
recommended_action: Remove other vehicle keys from the same ring. Use the second vehicle key. Have defective vehicle keys replaced by an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The engine control unit has detected a DTC fault.
recommended_action: DTC may not be available or may be restricted. You can continue to ride. Have the fault rectified as quickly as possible by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The engine control unit has detected a DTC fault.
recommended_action: DTC and other dynamic control functions are restricted. You can continue to ride. Have the fault rectified as quickly as possible by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: Monitoring of the ABS Pro function has detected a fault.
recommended_action: ABS Pro is not available. ABS is still available for straight-ahead braking. You can continue to ride. Have the fault rectified as quickly as possible.

possible_cause: The ABS control unit has detected a fault. The ABS function is not available.
recommended_action: You can continue to ride. Have the fault rectified as quickly as possible by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The ABS control unit has detected a fault. The ABS function is available subject to restrictions.
recommended_action: You can continue to ride. Have the fault rectified as quickly as possible by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: Communication between radio-operated key and propulsion-unit electronics is disrupted.
recommended_action: Check or replace the radio-operated key battery. Use the spare key to continue. Have the faulty radio-operated key replaced by an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The Keyless Ride control unit has diagnosed a communication fault.
recommended_action: Do not switch off the motor. Proceed directly to an authorised workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The integral battery in the radio-operated key has lost a significant proportion of its original capacity.
recommended_action: Replace the battery of the radio-operated key.

possible_cause: The integral battery in the anti-theft alarm has lost its entire original capacity. There is no assurance that the DWA anti-theft alarm will be operational if the vehicle battery is disconnected.
recommended_action: Consult a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The integral battery in the anti-theft alarm has lost a significant proportion of its original capacity.
recommended_action: Consult a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The DWA control unit has diagnosed a communication fault.
recommended_action: Consult a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer. DWA can no longer be activated or deactivated; false alarm possible.

possible_cause: Service is due because of either distance covered or time expired.
recommended_action: Have the vehicle serviced regularly by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: Service is overdue because of driving performance or the date.
recommended_action: Have the vehicle serviced regularly by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: A vehicle bulb or LED light source is faulty. The faulty bulb is displayed, such as additional headlight, side light, low-beam, high-beam, daytime riding light, turn indicator, rear light, brake light, number plate light or active headlight.
recommended_action: Visually inspect which bulb is defective. Have LED light sources replaced as complete units by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

display_text: Front light fault / Rear light fault
possible_cause: The vehicle lighting has partially or completely failed. Light control has diagnosed a communication fault.
recommended_action: Have the fault rectified as quickly as possible by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: Communication with the engine control unit has failed.
recommended_action: You can continue to ride. Have the fault rectified as quickly as possible by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The engine control unit has diagnosed a fault that can lead to serious consequential faults. The engine is in emergency-operation mode.
recommended_action: Ride slowly, avoid accelerating sharply and overtaking. Continuing is possible but not recommended. Have the vehicle picked up if possible and the fault rectified quickly.

possible_cause: The motor control unit has diagnosed a fault that affects pollutant emissions and/or reduces power.
recommended_action: Have the fault rectified by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer. You can continue riding, but pollutant emissions are higher than threshold values.

possible_cause: The engine control unit has diagnosed a fault that can lead to damage to the exhaust system.
recommended_action: Have the fault rectified as quickly as possible. Continuing is possible but not recommended.

possible_cause: The drop sensor is not available.
recommended_action: Consult a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The fall sensor has detected a fall and has cut out the motor.
recommended_action: Hold the vehicle upright and check it for damage. Switch the ignition off and on again or switch the kill switch on and off again.

possible_cause: Side-stand switch or wiring damaged. The motor will switch off when speed drops below the minimum threshold and you cannot resume your journey.
recommended_action: Consult a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The emergency call function has failed.
recommended_action: Consult a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The emergency call function is restricted.
recommended_action: Emergency call may not be fully available. Consult a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: Cruise control has failed.
recommended_action: Consult a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The vehicle battery is overheated.
recommended_action: Stop carefully, switch off the engine and wait for the battery to cool. Have the fault rectified by a specialist workshop.

meaning: Serious fault in the power supply
possible_cause: There is a serious fault in the power supply.
recommended_action: Do not continue riding. Notify the breakdown service.

meaning: Voltage of the vehicle electrical system critical
possible_cause: The vehicle electrical system voltage is critical. Too many consumers may be switched on, or the battery may not be charging adequately.
recommended_action: Switch off unnecessary consumers. If the warning persists, have the vehicle checked by a specialist workshop.

possible_cause: Battery is not being charged. Alternator malfunction, battery fault or fuse has blown.
recommended_action: Have the fault rectified as quickly as possible by a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: The temperature sensor has detected a high temperature in the motor.
recommended_action: If possible, ride in the part-load range to cool down the motor. If the motor temperature is frequently too high, have the fault rectified as soon as possible.

possible_cause: Engine is overheated.
recommended_action: Carefully bring the vehicle to a stop, switch off the engine and wait until it has cooled down. If overheating is frequent, have the fault rectified quickly.

meaning: Tyre pressure close to limit of permitted tolerance
possible_cause: Measured tyre pressure is close to the limit of permitted tolerance.
recommended_action: Correct tyre pressure. Before adjusting, read the information on temperature compensation and pressure adaptation. Find correct pressures in the rider manual or tyre pressure table.

possible_cause: Measured tyre pressure is outside permitted tolerance.
recommended_action: Adapt riding style. Check the tyre for damage and whether the vehicle can be ridden. Correct tyre pressure if safe. If unsure, do not continue and notify breakdown service.

possible_cause: The tyre pressure control (RDC) control unit has diagnosed a communication fault.
recommended_action: Consult a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

meaning: Battery for tyre pressure sensor weak
possible_cause: The tyre pressure sensor battery no longer has full capacity.
recommended_action: Consult a specialist workshop, preferably an authorised BMW Motorrad retailer.

possible_cause: Fuel is down to reserve. The distance counter for reserve fuel KM R or MI R is displayed.
recommended_action: Refuel as soon as possible.

possible_cause: The alarm has been triggered while the motorcycle was unattended.
recommended_action: Check the vehicle for tampering or damage.
